treatment.mitigateDescription: Implement controls to reduce likelihood or impact of the risk.

isms.title: Information Security Management
isms.justificationPlaceholder: Provide justification for this protection level...
isms.breachDeadline: A data breach must be reported to the supervisory authority within 72 hours of detection.
isms.normalDescription: Minor damage, no personal data affected
isms.highDescription: Significant damage, personal data may be affected
isms.veryHighDescription: Existential threat, special categories of data (Art. 9 GDPR)
isms.impactDisclosure: What would be the impact of unauthorized disclosure of data processed by this system?
isms.impactCorruption: What would be the impact of data manipulation or corruption in this system?
isms.impactOutage: What would be the impact of a system outage or unavailability?
isms.dataBreachDescription: Check if the incident involves personal data (triggers 72h GDPR notification deadline)
